_language_info.note: Drop this file (renamed to your locale, e.g. fr.json) into the Languages/ folder next to ClaudetRelay.exe. Missing keys fall back to English. Emoji are stored as UTF-8 and must be preserved.

About_Author: by H.-R. Matthes and Claude Code
Asr_DownloadHint: Models must be downloaded separately. Click "Manage ASR Models" to download and install them into the model folder above.
Asr_NoModelWarning: No ASR model loaded. Select a model folder and model name, then click OK.
Asr_PttRecord: Click, then press the desired key…
Asr_TestHint: Mic test activates the microphone — watch the level meter above. Speaker test plays a system sound.
Asr_ThresholdHint: Drag the marker to set when voice detection triggers. Green = clear speech, Orange = clipping risk.
Asr_TypeSenseVoiceHint: SenseVoice: very fast recognition, optimised for English, Chinese, Japanese and Korean. Does not officially support German — use Whisper instead if you need German.
Asr_TypeWhisperHint: OpenAI Whisper: supports ~100 languages including English and German. Use the tiny model (~78 MB) for speed, small (~250 MB) for better accuracy. Recommended for most users.
Asr_TypeZipformerHint: Streaming Zipformer Transducer: text appears phrase-by-phrase while you speak. Requires encoder, decoder and joiner .onnx files + tokens.txt. Recommended for voice commands.
Asr_TypeParaformerHint: Streaming Paraformer: text appears phrase-by-phrase. Optimised for Chinese; multilingual variants exist. Requires encoder and decoder .onnx files + tokens.txt.
Asr_TypeZipformer2CtcHint: Streaming Zipformer2 CTC: text appears phrase-by-phrase. Single model.onnx file + tokens.txt — easiest to set up of the streaming options.
Audio_MicBoostHint: 100 % = no boost. Raise if the mic level shows little movement when speaking.
Audio_NoFolderSelected: Please select a model folder first.
Audio_TestHint: Press Start, speak for up to 20 s, then press Stop — the recording plays back on the selected output device.
Autonomy_0_Desc: Helps only on request. Suggests, brainstorms, and executes tasks you directly assign. Never changes any file without your explicit approval for each action.
Autonomy_1_Desc: Asks for details and brainstorms together with you. Every final decision is yours. Never changes any file without your explicit confirmation.
Autonomy_2_Desc: Gathers requirements, proposes ideas, then presents a complete plan and asks for your go-ahead. Once approved: works through the roadmap in strict order (milestones → items, one by one).
Autonomy_3_Desc: Asks whether to set up context first (roadmap, INPUT folder, world editor) or jump straight in. Once you say go: draws on everything provided, stays consistent with inputs, follows the roadmap in order.
Autonomy_4_Desc: Just say "Go." Checks all available context (INPUT files, world data) and runs with it. Bold and creative — still logically coherent, but no step-by-step approval.
Board_AutoArrangeConfirm:
This will re-arrange ALL entities on this board and may disrupt your layout.

Continue?
Board_DragHint: Drag cards · Double-click to view · 🔗 to connect
Board_GridSizeError: Grid size must be between 4 and 200.
Board_RemoveConfirmConnections: This card has {0} connection line(s) that will also be removed. Remove from board?
Board_RemoveManyConfirmConnections: {0} cards have connection lines that will also be removed. Remove from board?
Board_ResetGridColour: Reset grid colour to theme default
Bridge_AddCloudTip: Add a cloud AI model as an agent (use with care)
Bridge_AddFolderTip: Add a folder agents can access
Bridge_AddLocalTip: Add a local Ollama model as an agent
Bridge_CloudAgentWarning: Only local models are advisable as Bridge agents.\n\nCloud agents use real API tokens on every bridge_ask call. They also count against rate limits. Use only if you know what you are doing.
Bridge_ControllerInfo: ℹ️  The controller AI directs local agents, keeping heavy token work on-device.
Bridge_CopyLogTip: Copy all log text to clipboard
Bridge_CtrlSettingsTip: Configure agents, folders and Controller tool access
Bridge_McpSettingsTip: Configure agents, folders and MCP tool access
Bridge_NoAgents: No agents yet.\nAdd local Ollama models to get started.
Bridge_NoControllerModel: ⚠ No controller model selected. Pick one above.
Bridge_NoFolders: No folders yet.\nAdd folders agents can read from.
Bridge_NoParticipants: No participants are currently enabled. Enable participants in the sidebar first.
Bridge_SelectProjectPrompt: Select a project to load into Bridge mode:
Bridge_TempWorkspaceHint: Shared scratch folder for parallel agent tasks. Must be inside a write-enabled folder.
BridgeSettings_CtrlLimitsNote:
Local controller: raise limits freely (no token costs).
Cloud controller: keep limits low to control API costs.
The active limit is chosen automatically based on whether the controller model is local or cloud.
BridgeSettings_CtrlSubtitle:
Tools available to the built-in controller AI when orchestrating agents.
Local models may be given more access than cloud connections (zero-trust policy).
BridgeSettings_McpLimitsNote: MCP Server always connects to cloud clients. Keep limits low to control API token costs.
BridgeSettings_McpSubtitle:
Tools exposed to Claude Desktop, Claude Code and other MCP clients.
Unchecked tools are hidden from external clients entirely.
Btn_UnderstandCost: I understand the cost and rate-limit implications
CharEditor_Critic: Critic - reviews output for consistency, logic errors, and hallucinations
CharEditor_CriticTip: Critic reviews the output of other participants after they respond. Brass badge (CR).
CharEditor_NoChars: No character files found in this project's Characters folder.
CharEditor_Planner: Planner - breaks the user's goal into a structured plan before execution
CharEditor_PlannerTip: Planner is called first to produce a work plan. Amber badge (PL).
CharEditor_PriorityTip: Higher number = higher priority (called first among reasoners). Lower number = called later.
CharEditor_Researcher: Researcher - gathers context and references before main answer
CharEditor_ResearcherTip: Researcher is called second (after Planner) to supply background knowledge. Steel-blue badge (RS).
CharEditor_Saved: Character "{0}" saved to the Characters folder.
CharEditor_WriteAccess: Write Access (WR) - may write files using <output> and <projectplan> tags
CharEditor_WriteAccessTip: Grants this participant file-write access. Coordinators always have write access. All other participants are read-only by default. Green badge (WR).
ClearChat_FilesOnly: 🗂  Delete history files only  (memory stays active)
ClearChat_MemoryOnly: 🧠  Clear memory only  (AI forgets — files kept)
ClearChat_Question: What would you like to clear?
Compression_Done: ✓  Compression done: {0} message(s) → {1} summary part(s) + {2} recent message(s) kept.
Compression_NoManager: ⚠  No compression manager available. Select one in ●●● → ⚙ Manager Settings, or enable a participant.
Compression_Starting: 🗜  Context window approaching limit — compressing conversation history…
Compression_TooShort: ℹ  History is too short to compress yet.
Dlg_ChooseTypeHint: Choose the type that best fits your project. You can change it later.
Dlg_ChooseTypeQuestion: What kind of project is this?
Dlg_SelectFolderForAgents: Select a folder for Bridge agents
Entity_CommonKnowledge: Common knowledge  (everyone may have heard this)
Entity_DropImage: Drop an image here, or click to browse
Entity_PortraitDrop:
Drop portrait
or click to browse
Err_FolderAlreadyAdded: That folder is already in the list.
Err_InvalidPort: Please enter a valid port number (1024–65535).
Err_NoChatHistory: This project has no chat history to export.
Err_NoProjectsFound: No projects found.\nCreate a project in Project mode first.
Err_SystemDirectory: Cannot use a system directory as temp workspace.
FileCheckout_AskCheckin: ⏱ @{participant}: You've had `{file}` checked out for {duration} minutes. Still working on it? Reply **yes** to keep the lock, or **no** / **done** to release it.
FileCheckout_Blocked: ⚠️  Cannot start task — files in use:
FileCheckout_Extended: 🔒 {participant} is still working on {file} — lock extended
FileCheckout_LockedTip: Checked out by {participant} ({mode}) — do not edit while the task is running
FileCheckout_LocksPreserved: ⚠ Active tasks have files locked — checkouts preserved. They will be released automatically when tasks finish.
FileCheckout_Stale: 💡 {participant} has {file} checked out for {duration} min but isn't busy. Remind them to check in when done?
FileCheckout_StillNeeded: Still working on {file}? (read-only: yes, read-write: yes if modifying)
Files_DeleteAllTip: Delete all saved versions of this file (current file is unaffected)
Files_InputDesc: Drop finished or reference files here. AI can read them but cannot write or delete them.
Files_OpenFolderTip: Open project folder in Windows Explorer
Files_OutputDesc: Files written by AI participants. Promote a finished file to INPUT to lock it from further AI edits.
Files_PlanDesc: Plans, outlines, task lists, and notes written by AI or the user.
Files_RestoreTip: Restore this version as the current file (current is backed up first)
FirstRun_Nickname_Question: How do you want to be called?
Folders_BackupClearTip: Disable backups (no backup prompt on project close)
Folders_BackupHint: ZIPs of the project folder are saved here. Leave empty to disable backup prompts. The folder is created automatically if it does not exist.
Participants_ContextWindowHint: num_ctx controls how many tokens the model holds in memory (input + output combined). Increase for long conversations. Most models support 8 192 – 131 072. num_predict caps the reply length; -1 = unlimited.
Participants_MaxReplyTokensHint: Caps the length of each reply (max_tokens). 0 = use the provider's default (usually 4 096). Increase for long structured outputs; decrease to save cost.
Participants_NameField: DISPLAY NAME  (optional — leave blank to auto-generate)
Participants_NoParticipantsHint:
No participants yet.
Click '＋ Add Participant' to create one.
Participants_PleaseSelectModel: Please enter or select a model.
Placeholder_Message: Type a message...  (Enter ↵ send  •  Shift+Enter for new line)
Projects_ClickToCreate: Click "New Project" below to create one.
Projects_FixParticipantsHint: Saved project participants — please resolve all conflicts:
Projects_MismatchHint: The project will not be loaded until the participants are resolved. Please fix or reconfigure the participant list.
Projects_NoProjects: No projects yet. Click ＋ New Project to create one.
ProjSettings_ApplyAllTip: Override the response length for every participant in this project
ProjSettings_ChattinessHint: Overrides the global Chattiness setting for this project. Silent = only respond when addressed. Chatty = always keep discussing.
ProjSettings_CoordFirstTip:
The Coordinator answers first and decides which Reasoner(s) should respond next.
Reasoners are triggered when the Coordinator tags them (e.g. @Reasoner).
Coordinator automation (SuperPowers calibration, work-session greeting) runs automatically.
ProjSettings_CoordOnlyTip:
The user communicates only with the Coordinator.
All AI-to-AI work (Coordinator deliberation + Reasoner responses) is hidden.
Small status indicators show which participant is active.
Only the Coordinator's final synthesis is shown to the user.
ProjSettings_CoordSumTip:
All participants respond normally. The Coordinator then receives all answers
as context and writes a final synthesising summary.
ProjSettings_DescHint: Shown to all AI participants as project context. Example: "A dark fantasy novel about a dragon who falls in love with a wizard."
ProjSettings_EmotesAllowed: Allow /me emote actions in project chat
ProjSettings_EmotesAllowedHint: Participants may use /me actions for emotion and roleplay (e.g. /me nods thoughtfully). Useful for creative writing, narrative, and roleplay projects. Off by default for work projects.
ProjSettings_FullManualTip:
Every active participant answers every user message - no coordinator automation.
No SuperPowers calibration, no work-session greeting.
Use when you want to manage all task assignments yourself.
ProjSettings_MaxDepthHint: How many AI-to-AI response rounds are allowed before the user must send a new message.
ProjSettings_MaxDepthTip: Positive integer. 1 = only respond to user (no AI-to-AI chaining).
ProjSettings_MaxFileOpDepthHint: Max auto-chained file reads / list ops per response. 0 = unlimited (reads entire file regardless of page count). Does not count toward dialog depth.
ProjSettings_MaxFileOpDepthTip: Integer ≥ 0. How many consecutive file operations a model may chain automatically. 0 = unlimited.
ProjSettings_NoParticipants: No participants are currently enabled. Enable participants in 👤 Participant Config first.
ProjSettings_ResetRoadmap: 🗺 Reset roadmap planning (coordinator re-starts conversation on next open)
Providers_EnterKeyInTab: ⚠  Enter an API key in the Providers tab first.
Roadmap_EmptyHint:
No roadmap items yet.
Click  "+ Milestone"  to add the first milestone.
Roadmap_NoItemsHint: No items yet - click  "+ Item"  to add the first task.
Settings_AiDialogueHint: Maximum number of reply turns when 💬 multi-round dialogue is enabled (3 – 100). Participants automatically stop when they have nothing new to add.
Settings_ChattinessHint: How eagerly participants join a conversation unprompted. 0 = only reply when directly addressed · 100 = always chime in
Settings_FileCheckoutTimeoutHint: Minutes before an idle participant is reminded to release a file lock. Participants who are actively generating get an automatic 1-minute extension instead of a reminder.
Settings_LanguageHint: Takes effect after restarting the application.
Settings_ModeBuccaneerTip: Arrr! Full pirate-speak for every participant. Yarrr!
Settings_ModeMockingbirdTip: Theatrical wit and loving chaos. Use at own risk.
Settings_ModeNeutralTip: Standard response tone — controlled by the slider above.
Settings_NameHint: Shown on your own chat bubbles
Settings_ResponseLengthHint: 50 = model default (no instruction injected)  ·  Only applies in general chat — project settings always take priority.
Settings_StreamIdleTimeoutHint: Seconds of silence before a participant's stream is considered hung and cancelled automatically. Resets with each received token, so a slow-thinking model is safe as long as it keeps producing output.
Settings_ToneHint: 0–9 = pure facts  ·  45–55 = app standard  ·  56–69 = model default (no injection)  ·  100 = warm & enthusiastic
Settings_UiZoomHint: Scales all windows uniformly. Main window applies immediately on save; other windows apply when next opened.
StreamTimeout_Msg: stream timed out after {0}s of silence. Check if the model is still running.
Sys_ProjectClosed: Project closed. Start a new chat or open a project from the Projects tab.
Sys_Welcome: Welcome! Configure participants from the Settings menu, then start chatting.
ToolTip_AddCloudAgent: Add a cloud AI model as an agent (use with care)
ToolTip_AddFolder: Add a folder agents can access
ToolTip_AddLocalAgent: Add a local Ollama model as an agent
ToolTip_AiDialogue: Multi-round AI dialogue — participants read and reply to each other
ToolTip_AllowWrite: Allow agents to write files in this folder
ToolTip_Backup: Create a ZIP backup of this project now
ToolTip_CloseProject: Save and close the current project
ToolTip_Config: Configure Chat Participants, Chat Settings and User Name
ToolTip_ControllerSettings: Configure agents, folders and Controller tool access
ToolTip_CopyLog: Copy all log text to clipboard
ToolTip_DisableParticipant: Disable this participant for this project
ToolTip_ExportChat: Export chat history as HTML, Markdown or Audio…
ToolTip_InputHint: Type your request — Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
ToolTip_LoadProjectRoster: Replace current agents with this project's saved roster (global roster restored on project close)
ToolTip_McpSettings: Configure agents, folders and MCP tool access
ToolTip_RemoveParticipant: Remove this participant from the project
ToolTip_RestoreGlobalRoster: Restore your global Bridge agent roster
ToolTip_SaveProjectRoster: Save the current agent list as this project's roster
ToolTip_TempWorkspacePath: Full path to the temp workspace folder
ToolTip_UpdateProjectRoster: Overwrite the saved roster with the current agent list
ToolTip_WhisperBtn: Send a private message to one participant (or type /whisper Name)
ToolTip_World: Characters, Factions, Locations and World Lore
WebAccess_AllowDownloadsHint: When unchecked, agents may read web pages but no files will be saved to disk.
WebAccess_AskHint: Semicolon-separated file extensions that trigger a confirmation dialog, e.g.  .docx;.xlsx;.pdf
WebAccess_AutoAllowHint: Semicolon-separated file extensions downloaded without a prompt, e.g.  .txt;.md;.pdf;.readme
WebAccess_CodeExtHint: Semicolon-separated extensions injected as-is, without sanitisation. All other text/document files are filtered (table rows, HTML, base64, etc.) before being sent to a model.
WebAccess_WhitelistHint: Only these domains may be fetched. Subdomains are included automatically (e.g. wikipedia.org also covers en.wikipedia.org).
World_NoBoardsHint:
A board is a visual canvas where you connect characters, locations, factions and lore.
Click '＋ New Board' above to create your first one.
World_NoFilterResults: No results match the current filters. Click ↺ Reset to clear.
VoiceCmd_InsertCharTooltip: The character(s) that will be inserted at the caret when this command fires
VoiceCmdEditor_DefaultAction: Immediate action (when no phrase command follows)
VoiceCmdEditor_FilterHint: Words/phrases the ASR model outputs for this noise. They are stripped from the text box when the command fires.
VoiceCmdEditor_NoModel: No ASR model loaded. Please activate a model first.
VoiceCmdEditor_NoRecording: Please record at least one noise reference.
VoiceCmdEditor_NoiseRefs: Noise references  (record the same noise 3 times)
VoiceCmdEditor_PhraseActions: Phrase commands  (optional, spoken after the noise)
VoiceCmdEditor_PhraseActionsHint: If one of these phrases is recognised after the noise, its action fires instead of the immediate action.
VoiceCmdEditor_PhraseLabel: Command phrase (not typed) — separate alternatives with ; e.g. period;dot
VoiceCmdEditor_PhraseRowTooltip: Phrase to match after the noise
VoiceCmds_Empty: No commands yet. Click "Add Command" to get started.
VoiceCmds_Hint: Commands are recognised while you dictate. Matched commands are silently consumed — never typed.
VoiceCmds_NoiseTip: 💡 For reliable detection, make your command noises acoustically very different from each other. Short, similar sounds — like a finger snap and a tongue click — are easily confused. Pairing distinct sounds (e.g. a snap, a 'shh', a hum, a whistle) works far better.
Code_ExportTooltip: Generate code skeletons from all code entities
Code_NoBoards:
No code boards yet.
Click "+ New Board" to create one.
Code_DeleteBoardConfirm:
Delete board "{0}"?
Entities are NOT deleted — only the board layout.
Code_NoEntitiesExport: No code entities to export yet.
Code_AddToBoardTip: Add a code entity to the board
Code_ConnectPortsTip: Click a port on one card, then a port on another
Code_RemoveCardsTip: Remove selected cards from this board
Code_ConnStartOutput: Start a connection from an Output port (green).
Code_ConnEndInput: End a connection on an Input port (blue).
Code_MismatchConv:
Cannot connect: passing convention mismatch.

Output '{0}' is {1}, input '{2}' is {3}.

Pointers, references and direct values must match.
Code_MismatchType:
Cannot connect: data type mismatch.

Output '{0}' is '{1}', input '{2}' is '{3}'.
Code_DeletePermConfirm: Permanently delete '{0}'? This cannot be undone.
Code_AllOnBoard: All existing entities are already on this board.
Flow_SelectTip: Normal mode: select and drag nodes
Flow_ConnectTip: Click a node, then another, to draw an arrow
Flow_RemoveTip: Click a node or arrow to delete it
Struct_Hint: Right-click any block to edit / insert / wrap. Use ＋ to add.
Flow_ToStructogramTip: Convert this flowchart to a structogram
Flow_ToStructogramOverwrite: A structogram already exists for this function. Overwrite it with the converted flowchart?
Flow_ToStructogramPartial: Converted — but some parts of the flowchart could not be structured. They are flagged in amber in the structogram.
Struct_FlaggedTip: This region could not be structured from the flowchart — review and rewrite it manually.
Code_GenAITip: Send the skeleton + flowchart hints to an AI participant and stream back full code
Code_NoAI: No AI participant is online. Enable one in the chat first.
Code_PickGeneratorHint: Which AI participant should generate the code? (Set a default in Manager Settings → Code Generator.)
Code_ExportAllTip: Export code for every card on this board
Code_ExportSelectedTip: Export code only for the selected cards
Code_NoSelection: No cards are selected. Click a card (Shift / Ctrl to multi-select) first.
SF_NotFoundMsg: StructoFox was not found. StructoFox is the external flowchart/code editor opened from the "Code" button. Download it, then point to StructoFox.exe:
SF_SettingsBody: Path to StructoFox.exe — the external flowchart/code editor launched from a project's "Code" button. Empty = pick it via a file dialog on first use.
